title: Summon Forth
description:
[gold]Forge[/gold] 8.
Put [gold]Sovereign Blade[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold] from anywhere.
upgraded_description:
[gold]Forge[/gold] 11.
Put [gold]Sovereign Blade[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold] from anywhere.
notes: Pulls all Sovereign Blade cards from any pile except hand into hand.
